title: Ontological Lens Removal
definition: The removal of the self-centered perceptual lens, enabling perception of reality as it truly is.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Removing the blurry glasses of self-centeredness to see reality more clearly.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The removal of the perceptual barrier of self-centeredness, allowing for a more accurate view of reality.
difficulty_levels.expert: A fundamental change in perception, removing the self as a perceptual barrier and enabling ontological insight.

extra_fields.insight: Removing the self as a perceptual lens.
